overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's downtown district. The player moves from a narrow alley onto wet streets lined with orange bollards, passing towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards with sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley opening onto neon-lit downtown street

events.description: exits narrow alley with purple vending machine onto the main street

agents.ego_description: walking out from a narrow alley onto wet pavement lined with orange bollards and neon signs

entered.detail: tall purple vending machine with glowing interface against the wall
building with distinctive yellow trim and circular window patterns
row of orange posts separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane street
large glowing advertisement screens mounted on building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow alley with a prominent purple vending machine on the left. The camera moves forward onto a wet downtown street, revealing a yellow building facade with circular patterns and orange traffic bollards lining the right side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with digital advertising towers

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing runs across the street from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street alongside orange bollards, approaching a major intersection with tall buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket and pants running across the street from left to right

entered.detail: towering modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising in the distance
tall street lamps with distinctive green glowing rings around the poles

segments.scene_description: Walking along the multi-lane street, the camera passes the yellow building and approaches an intersection. A pedestrian suddenly runs across the street from the left. Tall glass buildings with green-ringed street lamps become visible in the distance as the orange bollards recede.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown intersection with towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the massive skyscrapers and neon signs overhead
crossing the wide intersection into the downtown canyon with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the crosswalk while looking up at the massive architecture and neon displays overhead

entered.detail: gigantic twin skyscrapers with illuminated windows and corporate logos visible at the top
elevated walkway connecting buildings high above the street level

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide intersection and tilts upward to reveal massive skyscrapers towering overhead with an overhead pedestrian bridge connecting them. The scene opens into a wide downtown canyon with crosswalk stripes on the wet pavement and neon-lit buildings surrounding the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide downtown avenue with underpasses and street-level shops

events.description: blue sports car drives past from left to right across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide avenue as a sports car passes by, approaching a pedestrian waiting at a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: sleek blue sports car driving across the intersection from left to right
person standing at the crosswalk edge waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: covered walkway or tunnel entrance with red neon lighting and structural supports
storefronts with glowing signs and awnings at street level under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking through the wide downtown avenue, a blue sports car speeds past from left to right. The camera approaches an underpass structure with red neon lighting and street-level shops. A pedestrian stands waiting at a crosswalk on the right as the massive skyscrapers shift to the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined urban alleyway into the expansive, neon-lit canyon of a futuristic downtown district. It begins by moving past a purple vending machine in a narrow alley before emerging onto a wet street lined with orange bollards and a yellow building facade. As the camera advances toward an intersection, a pedestrian darts across the road and the view opens up to reveal distant glass towers and green-ringed street lamps. The scene then expands into a wide intersection where the camera tilts upward to capture massive skyscrapers and a connecting pedestrian bridge towering over the rain-slicked pavement. Finally, the movement continues down the broad avenue as a blue sports car speeds past, leading the camera toward a red-lit underpass and street-level shops while the skyscrapers shift to the periphery.
